privileged_info_summary: This task uses the official IRS Form W-9 (Rev. March 2024) from https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-pdf/fw9.pdf as the form template. All metadata expected values are synthetic/fictional test data: the company name 'Acme Industrial Supply LLC' is fictional, the address '4500 Auto Mall Dr, Kersey, PA 15846' is made-up, and the EIN '12-3456789' is a fictional sequential test value. The form fields (Lines 1-8) correspond to legitimate fields on the real IRS W-9 form. No real personally identifiable information, real business data, or sensitive information is contained in this task.
